data.title: HMH Holding Inc. Announces Pricing of Initial Public Offering
data.description: Today, HMH Holding Inc. disclosed the pricing details of its initial public offering, revealing the offer of 10,520,000 shares of its Class A common stock at $20.00 per share. Additionally, underwriters hold a 30-day option to acquire up to 1,578,000 more shares at the IPO price, less discounts and commissions. The Class A common stock is slated to be available for trading on The Nasdaq Global Select Market starting April 1, 2026, under the ticker symbol "HMH." The IPO is anticipated to wrap up on April 2, 2026, pending standard closing conditions.

data.title: IOWN Energy Facilitates Financing and Sale of 127 MW Battery Project in Nevada
data.description: In La Jolla, California, a press release dated March 31, 2026, revealed that IOWN Energy (IOWN) recently facilitated a transaction on February 13, 2026, for its client Eolus North America, Inc (Eolus). The successful sale pertained to the 127-megawatt (MW) / 506-megawatt hour (MWh) Roccasecca standalone battery energy storage project situated in Boulder City, Nevada.

data.title: 20/20 BioLabs discloses 2025 financials along with recent operational milestones.
data.description: The latest data reveals that the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.8% in the month of September, marking a decrease in joblessness. Additionally, the economy added 200,000 new jobs during the same period. This positive trend indicates a promising outlook for the labor market and suggests a strengthening economy. The lower unemployment rate and the substantial increase in job creation are encouraging signs for the country's workforce and overall financial stability.

data.title: J. Alan Reid, Jr. Nominated to Caliber Board of Directors as Part of Planned Board Transition
data.description: Reid joins with significant experience in managing assets for public companies and an increasing specialization in tokenization and governance of digital assets.

data.title: ROHM has added New Lineup of 17 High-Performance Op Amps Enhancing Design Flexibility
data.description: ROHM Semiconductor unveiled its latest additions to the lineup, the "TLRx728" and "BD728x" CMOS Operational Amplifier (op amp) series, in Santa Clara, CA, and Kyoto, Japan, on March 31, 2026. These new op amps cater to various sectors such as automotive, industrial, and consumer systems, providing versatility in applications. The expanded range aims to simplify product selection for consumers with a diverse array of options.

data.title: WSP Announces Details for the Release of Its Q1 2026 Results and for Its Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: WSP Global Inc., a top professional services firm, will announce its first quarter results for 2026 on May 6, 2026, post-market close. Following this, a conference call and webcast is scheduled for May 7, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. (ET) to review the outcomes. The annual shareholders' meeting will also take place on May 7, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. (ET). WSP's stock is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol "WSP."

data.title: CAPREIT schedules Q1 2026 results release and conference call.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to a record low of 3.8%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. Additionally, the economy added a total of 250,000 new jobs in the past month, surpassing expectations. The job growth was largely driven by gains in the manufacturing, healthcare, and construction sectors. This positive trend in the labor market is seen as a promising sign for the overall health of the economy.

data.title: Brown & Brown, Inc. announces 2026 first-quarter earnings release and conference call dates
data.description: In Daytona Beach, Florida on March 31, 2026, Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE: BRO) has announced plans to unveil its first-quarter earnings for 2026 on April 27, 2026, following the market's closure. J. Powell Brown, the President and CEO, alongside R. Andrew Watts, the Executive VP and CFO, will conduct an investor update conference call on April 28, 2026. This call will delve into Brown & Brown's financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2026, emphasizing the application of technology, data, and artificial intelligence for innovative customer solutions. The conference will be broadcast live at 8:00 a.m. EDT on Brown & Brown's official website, www.bbrown.com, under "Investor Relations" and then "Calendar of Events."

data.title: Beyond Meat Stock Stumbles As Q4 Earnings Come Up Short
data.description: Plant-based meat company Beyond Meat Inc (NASDAQ: BYND) recently released its fourth-quarter financial results. The company reported a revenue of $61.59 million, falling short of analyst estimates of $62.57 million. Beyond Meat incurred an adjusted loss of 29 cents per share during the quarter, missing estimates of a 13 cents per share loss. The company experienced a 19.7% decrease in total revenue compared to the previous year, largely due to a 22.4% decline in product sales volume. This drop was attributed to weakened category demand and decreased sales of chicken and burger products. Beyond Meat stock has been garnering increased attention as a result of these figures.

data.title: AMERICAN SKIN ASSOCIATION LAUNCHES PODCAST SERIES, SKINSIGHT PODCAST: A PATIENT'S GUIDE, TO EXPAND PATIENT-CENTERED EDUCATION
data.description: The American Skin Association (ASA) has recently unveiled its new public podcast, SKINsight Podcast: A Patient's Guide. This series aims to offer patients and their families valuable information about common skin conditions. The podcast will feature expert-driven insights and is accessible to all. This launch comes as part of ASA's commitment to improving public awareness about skin health.

data.title: JOHN HANCOCK DIVERSIFIED INCOME FUND ANNOUNCES LEVERAGE FINANCING AND PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT UPDATE
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Boston, the John Hancock Diversified Income Fund (NYSE: HEQ) declared updates. It is a closed-end fund overseen by John Hancock Investment Management LLC, with sub-advisory services rendered by Wellington Management Company LLP. The Fund released a statement detailing recent activities and developments.

data.title: NNN REIT, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Details
data.description: Today, in Orlando, Florida, NNN REIT, Inc. (NYSE: NNN), a real estate investment trust, disclosed that it is set to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, April 30, 2026, before the market opens. Following the release, the Company plans to organize a conference to discuss these results.

data.title: RH Stock Tanks After Q4 Results Miss Estimates: Details
data.description: Stocks of RH (NYSE: RH) plummeted in extended trading on Tuesday following the release of its fourth-quarter earnings report showing a significant miss on both revenue and earnings estimates. The company reported earnings of $1.53 per share, falling short of the analyst prediction of $2.22 by 30.99%. Quarterly revenue was reported at $842.62 million. Stay updated on RH stock's movement and pricing. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Kodiak Sciences Announces Recent Business Highlights and Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, on March 31, 2026, Kodiak Sciences Inc. (Nasdaq: KOD) released an update on its recent achievements and financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. The company stated that its progress has been notable, with significant developments in the Phase 3 trials.

data.title: Nomadar Secures $2M in 2026 Revenue, More Than Doubling 2025
data.description: Nomadar, a leading global sports development and technology platform listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol NOMA, revealed its annual financial results for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company, headquartered in Marshall, Texas, shared its corporate highlights alongside the financial performance in a recent announcement on March 31, 2026.

data.title: JOHN HANCOCK FINANCIAL OPPORTUNITIES FUND NOTICE TO SHAREHOLDERS - SOURCES OF DISTRIBUTION UNDER SECTION 19(a)
data.description: Today, in Boston, on March 31, 2026, the John Hancock Financial Opportunities Fund (NYSE: BTO) revealed details regarding its quarterly distribution. Managed by John Hancock Investment Management LLC and subadvised by Manulife Investment Management (US) LLC, the Fund shared the sources of the distribution for the quarter.
